# cliomicplot ![cliomicplot logo](reference/figures/logo.png)

**cliomicplot**\
_(*Publication-Ready Clinical & Multi-Omics Visualizations*)
============================================================

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## ⚡ 30 Seconds

``` r

# install.packages("remotes")
# remotes::install_github("vanhungtrantran/cliomicplot")
library(cliomicplot)

# One line = a publication-ready figure
cliplot(Surv(time, status) ~ sex, data = lung,
        type = "km", theme = "nejm", palette = "jama",
        title = "**Overall Survival** by Sex") +
  cli_markdown()
```

That’s it. No
[`ggplot()`](https://ggplot2.tidyverse.org/reference/ggplot.html)
boilerplate, no manual
[`theme()`](https://ggplot2.tidyverse.org/reference/theme.html)
tweaking, no
[`ggsave()`](https://ggplot2.tidyverse.org/reference/ggsave.html) dance.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Why cliomicplot?

**Raw ggplot2** for a grouped boxplot with stats:

``` r

library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
ggplot(ToothGrowth, aes(dose, len, fill = factor(dose))) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  stat_compare_means(method = "t.test", label = "p.format") +
  scale_fill_jco() +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(title = "Tooth Length by Dose", x = "Dose (mg)", y = "Length (mm)") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```

**cliomicplot:**

``` r

cliplot(len ~ dose, data = ToothGrowth,
        type = "boxplot", palette = "jco",
        stat.test = "t.test", title = "Tooth Length by Dose")
```

> **~80% less code.** Formula interface, auto-legends, journal themes,
> and statistical annotations built in.

| What you get for free | Base ggplot2 | cliomicplot |
|----|----|----|
| Formula interface (`y ~ x \| group`) | — | ✅ |
| Auto-legend + auto-facet | Manual | ✅ |
| Statistical annotations | Needs `ggpubr` | ✅ Built-in |
| Journal themes (Nature, NEJM, etc.) | Manual tweaking | ✅ `theme = "nejm"` |
| 55+ colorblind-safe palettes | Manual selection | ✅ `palette = "jco"` |
| Markdown in titles/labels | Needs `ggtext` | ✅ [`cli_markdown()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/cli_markdown.md) |
| Save to file | Separate [`ggsave()`](https://ggplot2.tidyverse.org/reference/ggsave.html) | ✅ `file = "plot.pdf"` |
| Persistent global theme | [`theme_set()`](https://ggplot2.tidyverse.org/reference/get_theme.html) | ✅ `clitheme("nature")` |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 📦 Installation

``` r

# From GitHub
remotes::install_github("vanhungtrantran/cliomicplot")

# Dependencies (installed automatically, but pre-install if needed)
install.packages(c("ggplot2", "scales", "survival", "reshape2", "ggrepel", "ggtext"))

# Optional: richer heatmaps (ComplexHeatmap) and extended survival plotting (survminer)
install.packages(c("ComplexHeatmap", "survminer", "ggpubr", "patchwork"))
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 🧩 The Formula API

cliomicplot uses `y ~ x | group` — the same convention you already know.

| Formula                      | What it does                       |
|------------------------------|------------------------------------|
| `y ~ x`                      | y vs. x (scatter/line)             |
| `y ~ x \| group`             | Grouped, auto-legend, auto-palette |
| `~ x \| group`               | One-sided distributional plot      |
| `Surv(time, status) ~ group` | Kaplan-Meier survival              |
| `HR ~ Variable \| Subgroup`  | Forest plot                        |

**All arguments in one call:**

| Argument | Purpose | Example |
|----|----|----|
| `type` | Plot type | `"boxplot"`, `type_km(risk_table = TRUE)` |
| `palette` | Color palette | `"jco"`, `"nejm"`, `"cosmic"` |
| `theme` | Theme | `"nature"`, `"dark"`, `"broadsheet"` |
| `facet` | Faceting formula | `facet = ~ dose` |
| `stat.test` | Statistical test | `"wilcox.test"`, `"anova"` |
| `file` | Save to file | `"figure1.pdf"` |
| `width`, `height` | Output dimensions | `width = 8`, `height = 6` |

### Global Defaults: `clipar()`

Set defaults for all plots — like
[`par()`](https://rdrr.io/r/graphics/par.html) for base R:

``` r

clipar(palette.qualitative = "nejm", stat.test = "wilcox.test",
       file.width = 8, file.height = 6, file.res = 600)

clipar("palette.qualitative")  # query a single parameter
# [1] "nejm"
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 🖼️ Gallery

Every figure is a single
[`cliplot()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/cliplot.md)
call. Click any image to enlarge.

### Clinical

|  |  |  |
|:--:|:--:|:--:|
| **Kaplan-Meier** | **Forest Plot** | **Volcano** |
| [![KM](reference/figures/km.png)](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/man/figures/km.png) | [![Forest](reference/figures/forest.png)](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/man/figures/forest.png) | [![volcano](reference/figures/volcano.png)](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/man/figures/volcano.png) |
| **Waterfall** | **Swimmer** | **MA Plot** |
| [![Waterfall](reference/figures/waterfall.png)](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/man/figures/waterfall.png) | [![Swimmer](reference/figures/swimmer.png)](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/man/figures/swimmer.png) | [![MA](reference/figures/ma.png)](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/man/figures/ma.png) |

| [![Parallel](reference/figures/parallel.png)](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/man/figures/parallel.png) | [![Spineplot](reference/figures/spineplot.png)](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/man/figures/spineplot.png) | [![Waffle](reference/figures/waffle.png)](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/man/figures/waffle.png) |

Full list: `points`, `jitter`, `barplot`, `lines`, `histogram`,
`density`, `errorbar`, `ribbon`, `boxplot`, `violin`, `ridge`,
`volcano`, `forest`, `km`, `waterfall`, `swimmer`, `heatmap`, `pca`,
`ma`, `correlation`, `text`, `bubble`, `lm`, `loess`, `spineplot`,
`rug`, `abline`, `qq`, `raincloud`, `dumbbell`, `lollipop`, `beeswarm`,
`radar`, `alluvial`, `waffle`, `chord`, `treemap`, `streamgraph`,
`connected`, `circular_bar`, `density2d`, `parallel`, `dendrogram`.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 🎨 Themes — Publication Ready

11 built-in themes. One function call.

``` r

clitheme("nature")     # persistent theme for all subsequent plots
cliplot(mpg ~ wt, data = mtcars)
clitheme()             # reset to default
```

Or per-plot:

``` r

cliplot(mpg ~ wt, data = mtcars, theme = "dark")
```

| Theme | Style | Journal / Use |
|----|----|----|
| `cli_bw` | Clean black-and-white | Default |
| `cli_classic` | Classic with axis lines | Base R aesthetic |
| `cli_minimal` | Minimalist | Modern general use |
| `nature` | Nature Publishing Group | Nature journals |
| `science` | Science / AAAS | *Science* |
| `nejm` | NEJM | *New England Journal of Medicine* |
| `lancet` | The Lancet | *The Lancet* |
| `cell` | Cell Press | *Cell* and family |
| `broadsheet` | Print-optimized with subtle grid | General publication |
| `showcase` | Polished presentation | Slides, posters |
| `dark` | Dark background | Talks, dashboards |

Register custom themes with
`clitheme_register("mytheme", base = "cli_bw", ...)`.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 🌈 Color Palettes

55+ built-in palettes. Discrete, sequential, diverging, and
journal-specific.

``` r

cli_palette_list()               # see all names
cli_palette_show("cosmic")       # preview a palette

# In plots
cliplot(mpg ~ wt | cyl, data = mtcars, palette = "npg")

# Standalone ggplot2 scales
ggplot(iris, aes(Sepal.Length, Petal.Length, color = Species)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  palette_scale("jama", "color")
```

| Category | Palettes |
|----|----|
| Journals | `jco`, `nejm`, `lancet`, `npg`, `jama`, `bmj`, `frontiers` |
| Genomics | `ucscgb`, `igv`, `locuszoom`, `cosmic`, `cosmic_sig`, `gsea`, `volcano` |
| Accessibility | `okabe_ito`, `tableau10`, `tol_muted` |
| D3 / Web | `d3_category10`, `d3_category20`, `flatui`, `material`, `bs5` |
| Sequential | `blues`, `reds`, `greens`, `purples`, `oranges` |
| Diverging | `heatmap_rdbu`, `heatmap_rdylbu`, `heatmap_prgn`, `rd_yl_gn`, `spectral`, `pi_yg` |
| Dark | `neon`, `cyberpunk` |
| Soft | `pastel`, `soft` |
| Sci-fi | `futurama`, `rickandmorty`, `simpsons`, `startrek` |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 📝 Markdown Text

Rich text in titles and labels with
[`cli_markdown()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/cli_markdown.md):

``` r

cliplot(len ~ dose, data = ToothGrowth, type = "boxplot",
        title = "**Tooth Length** by Vitamin C Dose",
        subtitle = "*p* &lt; 0.05 for all pairwise comparisons",
        ylab = "Length (mm)") +
  cli_markdown()
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 🔧 For Standalone ggplot2 Use

Use
[`palette_scale()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/palette_scale.md)
to drop cliomicplot palettes into any ggplot:

``` r

library(ggplot2)
ggplot(iris, aes(Sepal.Length, Petal.Length, color = Species)) +
  geom_point() +
  palette_scale("cosmic", "color")

# Continuous palettes too
ggplot(faithfuld, aes(waiting, eruptions, fill = density)) +
  geom_tile() +
  palette_scale("heatmap_rdbu", "fill", type = "continuous")
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 📚 Vignettes

- **Getting Started** —
  [`vignette("cliomicplot")`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/articles/cliomicplot.md)
- **Volcano Plot Guide** —
  [`vignette("volcano-plot")`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/articles/volcano-plot.md)
- **Oncology Workflows** —
  [`vignette("oncology")`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/articles/oncology.md)
- **Multi-Omics** —
  [`vignette("multiomics")`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/articles/multiomics.md)
- **Themes & Palettes** —
  [`vignette("themes-palettes")`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/articles/themes-palettes.md)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 🔗 References

- **tinyplot** — formula-interface inspiration
  ([github.com/grantmcdermott/tinyplot](https://github.com/grantmcdermott/tinyplot))
- **ggsci** — journal palette inspiration
  ([nanx.me/ggsci](https://nanx.me/ggsci/))
- **survminer** — survival plotting engine
- **ComplexHeatmap** — heatmap engine for omics data

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 📄 License

MIT © 2026 Lucas VHH Tran

# Package index

## Core engine

The main plotting function and layer helpers.

- [`cliplot()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/cliplot.md)
  : Publication-Ready Plots for Clinical and Multi-Omics Data
- [`cliplot_add()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/cliplot_add.md)
  : Add Layers to an Existing Cliomicplot
- [`cliplot_interactive()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/cliplot_interactive.md)
  : Interactive Plot Mode
- [`cli_markdown()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/cli_markdown.md)
  : Enable Markdown Rendering in Plot Text Elements

## Themes & parameters

- [`clitheme()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/clitheme.md)
  : Set or Reset Plot Themes for cliomicplot
- [`clipar()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/clipar.md)
  : Set or Query Cliomicplot Graphical Parameters
- [`clitheme_list()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/clitheme_list.md)
  : List Available Themes
- [`clitheme_md()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/clitheme_md.md)
  : Enable Markdown Globally for the Active Theme
- [`clitheme_md_reset()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/clitheme_md_reset.md)
  : Disable Global Markdown Rendering
- [`clitheme_register()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/clitheme_register.md)
  : Register a Custom Theme
- [`clitheme_unregister()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/clitheme_unregister.md)
  : Unregister a Custom Theme

## Palettes

- [`cli_palette_list()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/cli_palette_list.md)
  : List Available Cliomicplot Palettes
- [`cli_palette_show()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/cli_palette_show.md)
  : Show a Cliomicplot Palette
- [`palette_scale()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/palette_scale.md)
  [`scale_color_cli()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/palette_scale.md)
  [`scale_fill_cli()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/palette_scale.md)
  [`scale_color_cli_c()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/palette_scale.md)
  [`scale_fill_cli_c()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/palette_scale.md)
  : Build a ggplot2 Scale from a Cliomicplot Palette
- [`gradient_pal()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/gradient_pal.md)
  : Generate a smooth color gradient

## Clinical plot types

- [`type_volcano()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_volcano.md)
  : Volcano Plot Type
- [`type_forest()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_forest.md)
  : Forest Plot Type
- [`type_km()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_km.md)
  : Kaplan-Meier Survival Curve Type
- [`type_waterfall()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_waterfall.md)
  : Waterfall Plot Type
- [`type_swimmer()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_swimmer.md)
  : Swimmer Plot Type

## Omics plot types

- [`type_heatmap()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_heatmap.md)
  : Heatmap Type
- [`type_pca()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_pca.md)
  : PCA Plot Type
- [`type_ma()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_ma.md)
  : MA Plot Type
- [`type_correlation()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_correlation.md)
  : Correlation Matrix Plot Type
- [`type_boxplot()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_boxplot.md)
  : Boxplot Type
- [`type_violin()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_violin.md)
  : Violin Plot Type

## General plot types

- [`type_abline()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_abline.md)
  : Reference Lines Type
- [`type_alluvial()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_alluvial.md)
  : Alluvial / Sankey Diagram Type
- [`type_barplot()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_barplot.md)
  : Bar plot type
- [`type_beeswarm()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_beeswarm.md)
  : Beeswarm Plot Type
- [`type_boxplot()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_boxplot.md)
  : Boxplot Type
- [`type_bubble()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_bubble.md)
  : Bubble Chart Type
- [`type_chord()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_chord.md)
  : Chord Diagram Type
- [`type_circular_bar()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_circular_bar.md)
  : Circular Barplot Type
- [`type_connected()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_connected.md)
  : Connected Scatterplot Type
- [`type_correlation()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_correlation.md)
  : Correlation Matrix Plot Type
- [`type_dendrogram()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_dendrogram.md)
  : Dendrogram Type
- [`type_density()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_density.md)
  : Density plot type
- [`type_density2d()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_density2d.md)
  : 2D Density / Contour Plot Type
- [`type_dumbbell()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_dumbbell.md)
  : Dumbbell Plot Type
- [`type_errorbar()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_errorbar.md)
  : Error bar type (requires ymin and ymax)
- [`type_forest()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_forest.md)
  : Forest Plot Type
- [`type_heatmap()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_heatmap.md)
  : Heatmap Type
- [`type_histogram()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_histogram.md)
  : Histogram type
- [`type_infobar()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_infobar.md)
  : Infographic Bar Chart
- [`type_jitter()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_jitter.md)
  : Jitter Plot Type
- [`type_km()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_km.md)
  : Kaplan-Meier Survival Curve Type
- [`type_lines()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_lines.md)
  : Line plot type
- [`type_lm()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_lm.md)
  : Linear Model Fit Type
- [`type_loess()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_loess.md)
  : LOESS Smoothing Type
- [`type_lollipop()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_lollipop.md)
  : Lollipop Chart Type
- [`type_ma()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_ma.md)
  : MA Plot Type
- [`type_parallel()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_parallel.md)
  : Parallel Coordinates Plot Type
- [`type_pca()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_pca.md)
  : PCA Plot Type
- [`type_points()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_points.md)
  : Scatter plot type
- [`type_qq()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_qq.md)
  : Q-Q Plot Type
- [`type_radar()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_radar.md)
  : Radar / Spider Chart Type
- [`type_raincloud()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_raincloud.md)
  : Raincloud Plot Type
- [`type_ribbon()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_ribbon.md)
  : Ribbon/area plot type
- [`type_ridge()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_ridge.md)
  : Ridgeline Plot Type
- [`type_rug()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_rug.md)
  : Rug Plot Type
- [`type_spineplot()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_spineplot.md)
  : Spine Plot / Spinogram Type
- [`type_streamgraph()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_streamgraph.md)
  : Streamgraph / Streamchart Type
- [`type_swimmer()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_swimmer.md)
  : Swimmer Plot Type
- [`type_text()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_text.md)
  : Text/Label Plot Type
- [`type_treemap()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_treemap.md)
  : Treemap Type
- [`type_trials()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_trials.md)
  : Clinical Trials Pipeline Stacked Bar Chart
- [`type_violin()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_violin.md)
  : Violin Plot Type
- [`type_volcano()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_volcano.md)
  : Volcano Plot Type
- [`type_waffle()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_waffle.md)
  : Waffle Chart Type
- [`type_waterfall()`](https://vanhungtran.github.io/cliomicplot/reference/type_waterfall.md)
  : Waterfall Plot Type
